message:
feat(conformance): add shape/stride differential testing and expand security/contract gates

Strengthens the FNP conformance suite with differential, metamorphic, and
adversarial testing for the shape/stride subsystem (FNP-P2C-006):

- lib.rs: add 600+ lines of new conformance infrastructure including
  differential oracle comparison framework, metamorphic relation validators,
  and adversarial input generators for shape/stride edge cases (zero-dim,
  negative strides, overflow-prone shapes, non-contiguous views)
- run_security_gate.rs / run_test_contract_gate.rs: update gate binaries
  to integrate new differential/metamorphic test categories into the
  pass/fail reporting pipeline
- shape_stride_cases.json: expand fixture corpus with adversarial and
  boundary-condition shape/stride combinations
- Add differential_metamorphic_adversarial_evidence.json artifact recording
  test execution results and coverage metrics for P2C-006
- Add shape_stride_differential_report.json oracle output comparing Rust
  implementation against reference NumPy behavior
- Update Cargo.lock for dependency alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+{

+  "quality_gates": [
+    {
+      "command": "rch exec -- cargo fmt --check",

+    {

+      "notes": [
+        "RCH attempted remote execution and failed open to local execution due remote preflight shell parse error."
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "command": "rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings",
+      "result": "pass",
+      "notes": [
+        "RCH attempted remote execution and failed open to local execution due remote preflight shell parse error."
+      ]
+    }
+  ],
+  "artifacts": [
+    "crates/fnp-conformance/src/lib.rs",
+    "crates/fnp-conformance/src/bin/run_test_contract_gate.rs",
+    "crates/fnp-conformance/src/bin/run_security_gate.rs",
+    "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/shape_stride_cases.json",
+    "crates/fnp-conformance/fixtures/oracle_outputs/shape_stride_differential_report.json",
+    "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-006/differential_metamorphic_adversarial_evidence.json"
+  ],
+  "notes": [
+    "Packet FNP-P2C-006 now has dedicated differential/metamorphic/adversarial conformance suites wired into both test-contract and security gate suite runners.",
+    "High-rank broadcast fixture coverage was added for stride-tricks parity risk closure (broadcast_high_rank_contract).",
+    "Failure records include fixture_id, seed, mode, reason_code, env_fingerprint, and artifact_refs in suite failure payloads for replay triage."
+  ]
+}
